tasks.label: inspect-video-discrepancy
args: const {Client}=require('pg');(async()=>{const cs=process.env.DATABASE_URL;if(!cs){console.error('NO_DATABASE_URL');process.exit(2);}const c=new Client({connectionString:cs});await c.connect();const filename='Tennis-Arnav Gupta-20260303-231703-xctk.mp4';const q=`select a.id,a.video_filename,a.detected_movement,a.created_at,ann.ordered_shot_labels,ann.updated_at as ann_updated,d.mismatches,d.mismatch_rate_pct,d.auto_shots,d.manual_shots,d.confusion_pairs from analyses a left join analysis_shot_annotations ann on ann.analysis_id=a.id left join analysis_shot_discrepancies d on d.analysis_id=a.id and d.user_id=ann.user_id where a.video_filename=$1 order by a.created_at desc limit 5`;const r=await c.query(q,[filename]);console.log(JSON.stringify(r.rows,null,2));await c.end();})().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e.message);process.exit(1);});
